description: Decide whether Plan can safely run in simple mode
instructions: Prepend the skill_check_prompt to your task prompt when invoking the Task tool

parameters.ticket:
In Account settings, expose all of the Clerk embeddable UI for account management. This includes:

1. OrgSelector - organization selector/switcher
2. Admin Org controls (for org admins):
   - Add/remove organization members
   - Enable/configure 2FA requirements
   - Manage org roles and permissions
3. Individual user settings:
   - Password reset
   - Profile management
   - Security settings (personal 2FA, sessions, etc.)
4. Special 'Admin' section that only appears for users with org admin roles, containing all administrative controls

The /settings page should be restructured to have clear sections for personal user settings and (when applicable) organization admin settings.

skill_check_prompt:
MANDATORY: Before doing ANY work, you MUST create a todo list with TodoWrite containing:

Todo 1 (status: pending): "Check available skills for matches"
Todo 2 (status: pending): "Execute the main task"

You MUST complete Todo 1 FIRST by:
1. Check if ANY of your available skills match this task by examining descriptions
2. If skills match → Mark Todo 1 complete, invoke them with Skill tool
3. If NO skills match → Mark Todo 1 complete, proceed to Todo 2

After skill check, proceed with your actual task:
